trigger_keywords: burbujas inesperadas en un vino tranquilo embotellado

steps.label: cause
steps.text: Viable yeast or bacteria remain in a bottled still wine containing fermentable substrate.

steps.label: mechanism
steps.text: Microorganisms resume activity in bottle and produce carbon dioxide that cannot escape.

steps.label: effect
steps.text: Unexpected bubbles, pressure, haze, sediment, or off-aromas can appear in a wine intended to be still.

steps.label: exam_formulation
steps.text: Formative causal formulation: Unexpected bubbles, pressure, haze, sediment, or off-aromas can appear in a wine intended to be still.

_meta.source_note: Inferred formative model - not official WSET assessment or mark-scheme content
